notes: F009 build complete. rate_limiter.py implements a per-fingerprint token bucket (60 req/min default). auth.py adds record_session_activity / is_session_expired / rotate_install_token + related config. serve_platform's _install_gate_pass() composes the F006 auth check + F009 rate limit + F009 session expiry in one place; on 429 sends Retry-After header; on session-expiry rejects with the hint to rotate. Test count 15 target -> 29 delivered (14 rate_limiter + 9 session_expiry + 6 rotation). Full suite 1259 -> 1287 (+28 -- 29 new minus 1 replaced through the fallback fix).
review_criteria: Threat model: rate-limit bypass, session replay, token leakage on rotation
Composition: order of checks in _install_gate_pass is correct (auth -> expiry -> rate-limit -> record activity)
Regression: RedactingFilter still scrubs rotated plaintext
Config safety: default 60 req/min + 7-day expiry is safe for an interactive dashboard user
